title: Partnerize Brands API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the Partnerize Brands API (OAS 3.0.1)

id.description: A unique ID for the incident

type.description: Which type of entity triggered this incident

time_window.description: Over how many days did we calculate the metric

ip_address.description: A hashed identifier for an IP address

allOf.description: Properties unique to fraud incident baskets
This is supplemental data for fraud incident baskets
Properties that all indicent types share
This is supplemental data for fraud incidents ttc and conversion value
This is supplemental data common to all fraud incidents

value.description: The actual value of this metric

network_notes.description: Any additional notes for the network

network_id.description: ID of the network this partner belongs to

is_foreign_network.description: Reporting only flag. All conversions will be automatically approved but will not be invoiceable.

country.description: ISO-2 country code of the user

signup_ip.description: The signup IP address of the user

firstname.description: The first name of the user

lastname.description: The last name of the user

created.description: Datetime stamp of when the user account was created

network_id.description: The network ID of which the user belongs to

network_name.description: The network name of which the user belongs to

user_api_key.description: The API key of the user account

vertical.description: The vertical ID of the partner

promotional_method.description: The promotional method ID of the partner

signup_ip.description: The signup IP address of the partner

entity_terms_id.description: The agreed terms and conditions ID. The ID must be retrieved by retrieving the terms and conditions from the [network terms and conditions API.](#tag/Network-Terms-and-Conditions)

network_terms_id.description: The agreed network terms and conditions ID

vat_number.description: The VAT number of the partner

company_name.description: Company name associated to the partner

operating_country.description: Country of operation for the partner

contact_name.description: The contact name of the partner.

contact_email.description: The contact email of the partner.

contact_locale.description: The contact ISO locale for the partner.

publisher_id.description: ID of the partner the website belongs to
ID of the partner the database belongs to

ref_terms_and_conditions_locale_id.description: Terms and conditions ID, used for partner signup

advertiser_id.description: ID of the brand the campaign should belong to

report_meta_purge_period.description: The number of days that Meta Reports will be stored before being purged

display_name.description: Name shown to publishers under brand campaign management

phone_area.description: Phone prefix to declare country or region

commission_groups.description: Commission groups associated with the voucher

publishers.description: IDs of the partners to be associated with the group

country_iso.description: Whether it applies to a specific country

coupon_code.description: A specific coupon or voucher code associated with the deal

destination.description: A deeplink to the specific deal location

end_date_time.description: Timezone specific timestamp to indicate the deal expiry time

offer_value.description: The unit to attribute to the `offer_type`

start_date_time.description: Timezone specific timestamp to indicate the start of the deal

code.description: The iso code of the locale

printable_name.description: The dictionary word for the locale

AED.description: The ISO value for the currency

country_iso.description: An array of ISO values for the compatible currencies

iso.description: The ISO code for the country

printable_name.description: The dictionary word for the locale

iso.description: The ISO value for the currency

campaign_extra_field_id.description: The id of the extra field

field_default_value.description: The value assigned if no value is passed in

field_name.description: The name of the extra field

name.description: The name of the website type

website_id.description: The id of the website type

name.description: The name of the promo method

promotional_method_id.description: The id of the promo method

conversion_type.description: The name of the extra field

conversion_type_id.description: The id of the conversion type

total_conversion_count.description: conversion count for each currency. E.g. "USD": 25, "EUR": 37

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_commission_value.description: commission value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 324.65, "EUR": 583.59

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_order_value.description: order value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 4000, "EUR": 5400.25

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_publisher_commission_value.description: commission value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 400, "EUR": 311.215

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37
key value pairs where the `currency iso` is the key and the value is an object containing a set of stats for the currency
key value pairs where the `currency iso` is the key and the value is an object containing a set of stats for the currency

range{index}.description: an indexed range. E.g. range0, range1, etc.

total_conversion_count.description: conversion count for each currency. E.g. "USD": 25, "EUR": 37

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_commission_value.description: total commission value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 250.5, "EUR": 180.9

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_publisher_commission.description: total publisher commission for each currency. E.g. "USD": 250.5, "EUR": 180.9

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37
key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

meta_data.description: Key value pairs of meta data
Key value pairs of meta data
Key value pairs of meta data

data.description: Must be a valid JSON string

account_created.name: account_created
account_created.description: Date range for when partners signed up

fields.name: fields
fields.description: CSV list of fields to be returned as part of the response

include_discovery.name: include_discovery
include_discovery.description: Whether to include partners with pending requests from brand discovery or invites from partner discovery

website_verified.name: website_verified
website_verified.description: Whether to filter partners by their primary website domain verification status

limit.name: limit
limit.description: The number of records to retrieve

locales.name: locales
locales.description: The publishers' contact locale (locale codes), see https://api.partnerize.com/reference/locale

network_statuses.name: network_statuses
network_statuses.description: The publishers' network status. Choosing requested or invited will automatically enable the include_discovery option for convenience.

operating_countries.name: operating_countries
operating_countries.description: The publishers' operating countries (country isos), see https://api.partnerize.com/reference/country

promotional_countries.name: promotional_countries
promotional_countries.description: The publishers' promotional countries (country isos), see https://api.partnerize.com/reference/country

publisher_name.name: publisher_name
publisher_name.description: Search by the publishers' company name, falling back the publisher name
